role: This directory aggregates the second-level components of the ArchSpine mirror system, providing a consolidated view of subsystem interactions and data flow.
responsibility: The components in this directory collectively manage the synchronization, indexing, validation, routing, and access control of mirrored data across distributed nodes, while defining logical and functional layers including configuration management and interface abstraction, ensuring consistency, fault tolerance, and a cohesive, extensible system architecture.
